description: Wikipedia's official REST API + Action API. No key required. Page summaries, search, full article content, related pages, in 300+ languages.

summary.notes: Concise summary of a page — extract, thumbnail, description, lang. :title URL-encoded (e.g. Albert_Einstein). Use for fast factual lookups.

html.notes: Full rendered HTML of a page. Heavy — prefer /summary or /search if you only need facts.

related.notes: Up to 20 related pages with summaries — good for 'see also' workflows.

random.notes: A random Wikipedia article summary. No cache (output is random by design).

search.notes: Full-text search via Action API. Required: ?action=query&list=search&srsearch=YOUR_QUERY&format=json&origin=*. Returns hits with snippet.
